steps.action: Open http://localhost:3200 in a fresh browser session and wait for the landing page to settle.
steps.expected: The public landing page renders and remains testable from public routes only.
steps.observed: Landing page loaded successfully at / with the expected marketing title and no route changes outside the public surface.

steps.action: Use keyboard Tab navigation across the landing page header controls.
steps.expected: Interactive elements are reachable in a logical order and show visible focus indicators.
steps.observed: Observed sequence: 1) Complete Care (/), 2) Features (/#features), 3) Why Us (/#compare), 4) Pricing (/pricing), 5) Sign in (/login), 6) Get Started Free (/register). Each focused link showed a visible rgb(0, 95, 204) auto 1px outline with 1px outline-offset.

steps.action: Capture a focused-state screenshot and inspect rendered images for alt coverage.
steps.expected: Visible focus styling is present and rendered images expose alt text.
steps.observed: Focused brand link screenshot captured successfully. The rendered landing page contained 0 elements, so there were no missing alt attributes among rendered images in this run.

steps.action: Run an in-browser axe-core audit scoped to wcag2a and wcag2aa.
steps.expected: No critical/basic accessibility violations remain on the landing page.
steps.observed: axe reported 0 violations for wcag2a/wcag2aa on the rendered landing page.

steps.action: Check for console/runtime issues after the landing-page accessibility flow.
steps.observed: agent-browser error log was empty; local response check returned GET / -> 200.

evidence.focusStyles: Focused links showed rgb(0, 95, 204) auto 1px outline with 1px outline-offset.
evidence.altTextCoverage: Rendered count: 0; missing alt: 0; empty alt: 0.

assertions.title: Landing page — SEO meta tags present

steps.action: Load the landing page and capture a full-page screenshot for the tested surface.
steps.expected: The landing page remains stable while metadata is inspected.
steps.observed: Landing page remained stable on http://localhost:3200/ and a full-page screenshot was captured.

steps.action: Read the rendered title in-browser and inspect the server-rendered landing-page HTML metadata fields.
steps.expected: Title, description, Open Graph fields, canonical URL, and og:image are present and populated.
steps.observed: Observed title="Complete Care — UK Care Management Platform | Complete Care"; description="The only platform purpose-built for domiciliary care, supported living, and children's residential homes — with native Ofsted + CQC compliance and AI throughout."; og:title="Complete Care — UK Care Management Platform"; og:description="Manage domiciliary care, supported living, and children's residential homes from a single unified platform with native CQC and Ofsted compliance."; og:type="website"; canonical="http://localhost:3200"; og:url="http://localhost:3200"; og:image="http://localhost:3200/og-image.png".

steps.action: Assess whether canonical/share metadata uses a public-safe origin.
steps.expected: Canonical/share URLs should avoid localhost and point at a public-safe production/share origin.
steps.observed: canonical, og:url, and og:image all point at localhost, so the metadata is not public-safe for search/social sharing.

metadata.title: Complete Care — UK Care Management Platform | Complete Care
metadata.description: The only platform purpose-built for domiciliary care, supported living, and children's residential homes — with native Ofsted + CQC compliance and AI throughout.
metadata.og:title: Complete Care — UK Care Management Platform
metadata.og:description: Manage domiciliary care, supported living, and children's residential homes from a single unified platform with native CQC and Ofsted compliance.

assertions.issues: Metadata fields are populated, but canonical/share URLs still use localhost instead of a public-safe origin, so the assertion does not fully pass.

summary: Tested 2 assertions on the public landing page: VAL-MARKET-013 passed (visible keyboard focus, logical keyboard order, 0 rendered images with missing alt, and axe wcag2a/wcag2aa reported 0 violations), while VAL-MARKET-014 failed because canonical/share metadata still points to localhost (canonical, og:url, og:image) instead of a public-safe origin.
